prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等热门专 业在招生计划中，对考生有吸引力；贵州省2026年考生总数约299000人，按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算约208400人，较2025年物理类207171人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川，在贵州省招生占比不高（2025年约1.5%），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次38945名、2026年扩招11.6%使位次后移约2700名、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、本省物理类考生略增等因素，扩招效应占主导但考生增加和学校层次提 升部分抵消；预测2026年物理类最低位次约41462名，区间40962–41962名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 26467 → 25683 → 45909 → 37402 → 38945. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (45909), followed by a significant rebound to 37402 in 2024, and a slight backward shift to 38945 in 2025. In recent two years, rankings fluctuated within the 37000–39000 range, with a baseline of about 38945 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan increased from 29 in 2021 → 31 in 2022 → 34 in 2023 → 40 in 2024 → 43 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 48, an increase of 5 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative (cafeteria and dormitory issues), while in 2026, reputation is neutral/mixed (library management related). Douyin heat total ranking is 104th, rated as 'average', with no obvious abnormal application heat signals. There are no related signals in historical abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), and Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) are included in the enrollment plan, attracting applicants. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with an estimated 208,400 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 69.7%, a slight increase from 207,171 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, with a low enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province (about 1.5% in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 38945, an 11.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing a backward shift of about 2700 positions, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and a slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by the increase in examinees and the improvement in university level. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 41462, with a range of 40962–41962.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<40962), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>41962), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 safety majors.
